# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences. What changes, why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new functionality
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — internal change, no behavior change
- [ ] test — test additions or fixes
- [ ] chore — build / tooling / dependencies

## Schema / hash chain impact

- [ ] No change to `packages/schema` AuditLogEntry structure
- [ ] No change to canonicalization or hashing
- [ ] No change to signature format
- [ ] If any of the above is checked NO, this PR includes a `schemaVersion`
      bump and a migration note in the description below.

## Testing

- [ ] Added or updated tests covering the change
- [ ] Coverage on `packages/schema` and `packages/sdk` still ≥ 85%
- [ ] Manual verification steps documented below (if applicable)

## Marketing / language

- [ ] Changes to README or any public-facing docs were reviewed against
      [`/legal/marketing-checklist.md`](../legal/marketing-checklist.md)

## Closes

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->
